posts.text:
Goldman trading desk mid-day flows: long onlies selling, hedge funds buying

We are currently a 5 out of 10 in terms of overall activity levels and flows are skewed 75bps better for sale.
LOs are skewed 10% better for sale   with supply in macro products, financials, and utilities.
HFs are skewed 4% better to buy   with demand in real estate, industrials, and info tech.
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: As exercise gets more intense, the heart rate rises to deliver more oxygenated blood to working muscles. But there is an upper limit https://www.economist.com/science-and-technology/2026/03/06/what-is-your-maximum-heart-rate?taid=69ab2ff06de6e400019a75a3&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
BREAKING: The Trump Administration announces $20 billion reinsurance program for oil tankers and other vessels moving through the Strait of Hormuz.

Details include:

1. The US DFC will insure losses up to $20 billion on a rolling basis

2. The US DFC and Treasury Department will be coopering with CENTCOM on the program

3. Priority is to get oil, gasoline, LNG, jet fuel, and fertilizer through the Strait of Hormuz

Currently, ~20% of global oil supply is offline.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
